rules.title: DashScope/Qwen provider assumptions should be documented
rules.titleZh: 应记录 DashScope/Qwen provider 假设
rules.description: Looks for DashScope or Qwen environment names in local examples.
rules.descriptionZh: 在本地示例中查找 DashScope 或 Qwen 环境变量名称。
rules.recommendation: Document provider base URL, model name, rate-limit assumptions, and fallback behavior.
rules.recommendationZh: 记录 provider base URL、模型名称、限流假设和降级策略。

rules.title: DeepSeek provider assumptions should be documented
rules.titleZh: 应记录 DeepSeek provider 假设
rules.description: Looks for DeepSeek environment names in local examples.
rules.descriptionZh: 在本地示例中查找 DeepSeek 环境变量名称。
rules.recommendation: Document base URL, model name, data boundary, and fallback behavior.
rules.recommendationZh: 记录 base URL、模型名称、数据边界和降级策略。

rules.title: China-ready provider notes should cover configured vendors
rules.titleZh: 国内大模型 provider 说明应覆盖已配置服务商
rules.description: Looks for GLM/Zhipu, Moonshot/Kimi, or MiniMax provider hints.
rules.descriptionZh: 查找 GLM/智谱、Moonshot/Kimi 或 MiniMax provider 线索。
rules.recommendation: Add deployment notes for each provider used by the project.
rules.recommendationZh: 为项目使用的每个 provider 补充部署说明。

rules.title: OpenAI-compatible base URLs should identify the provider
rules.titleZh: OpenAI-compatible base URL 应说明服务商
rules.description: Looks for OpenAI-compatible base URL configuration.
rules.descriptionZh: 查找 OpenAI-compatible base URL 配置。
rules.recommendation: Name the provider behind each OpenAI-compatible base URL and document data handling assumptions.
rules.recommendationZh: 说明每个 OpenAI-compatible base URL 背后的服务商，并记录数据处理假设。
